title: Centre Principal
description:
Key Areas of Responsibility

Daily Operations

· Establish and set up process for all enquiries are addressed appropriately and in a positive manner, providing relevant information to promote theschool.

· Analyseandreviewallschoolinformationanddevelopprocessesthatrecordsystemsareuptodate,inaccordance with regulatory compliance, easily accessible to management and inaccessible to others such as parents and visitors.

· Statutory and organisational requirements are met and current including, but not limited to, Attendance Sheets, Children and Employee Particulars Files, GSII Subsidies Reports, Receipts and EnrolmentInformation.

· Establish procedures including weekly conversion reports, monthly enrolment reports and salary lists, fees collection, debt management and school purchasing are maintained and provided in the requiredtimeframes.

· All government subsidies, financial aids and other funding must be kept up to date and submitted on time for promptpayments.

· Guide principals on maintaining and monitoring use of equipment with an up to date inventory of furniture, fittings, resources and equipment documented and filed at alltimes.

· Design and review school environment in accordance to HQrequirements.

· Report repairs and maintenance issues and monitor on follow upactions.

· Establish processes for smooth operations of school and resolve any feedbacksreceived.

· Plan and conduct Centre Monthly meetings and Monthly Cluster meetings with minutes documented and follow up actionsplanned.

Compliance

· Establish and develop policies and procedures, implemented, evaluated and reviewed in conjunction with employees and management on a regularbasis.

· Monitor policy development and plan for futurereviews.

· Keep up to date with changes in regulations and industry trends and communicate this information to theteam.

· Review Teachers and Parent Handbooks are reviewed in conjunction with managementregularly.

· GuidePrincipalstoensureschoolcomplianceandcommitmenttorelevantECDAChildCareRegulationsandthe Quality Improvement and AccreditationSystem.

· Guide Principals on Regulatory Standards and ensure that it is evident during all licensing inspections conducted byECDA.

Quality Programmes

· Set direction for principals in achieving curriculum objectives aligned to Vision, Mission and Core Values of school.

· Establish programs which reflects the school philosophy and employees are given adequate planning time on a weeklybasis.

· Strengthen culture of learning among centres and teammembers.

· Use observational tools to conduct classroom observations to review teaching practices with follow upactions.

· Design observational processes and use observations to guideothers.

· Establishanddevelopappropriatemethodsofbehaviourmanagementtoencouragepositivebehaviourinchildren.

· Review the monthly peer Teaching and Learning sessions with proper documentationfiled.

· Review quality programmes by evaluating suggestions and feedbacks from allstakeholders.

· Share good practices with principals on how to keep up to date records of curriculum documents, teaching resources and booksinventories.

· Guide principals with quality curriculum deliverance strategies and monitor individual staff Continuing Professional Development(CPD).

· Involve parent support group in evaluating effectiveness of home learningsupport.

· Review and enhance its collaboration with community partners and to guidecentres.

Staff Management

· Establish effective work practices for all employees in theschool.

· Employee personnel files are complete, current andconfidential.

· Manage employee recruitment and placement according to MOM regulations and Company’spolicies.

· Implement principal/staff induction and review Mentorship/Internship Programme inschool.

· Ensure principals plan and maintain relevant teacher to child ratio at all times, in accordance to ECDAstandard.

· Design processes to strengthen staff morale through effective leadershipguidance.

· Review its approaches to meet staff needs annually and place staff engagement processes to motivate staff and develop staffcommitment.

· Plan and review annually staff deployment for planned and unplanned absence of teachers, ensuring that classes and all programmes activities should beconducted.

· Gather feedback from staff and principal to improve staff well-being in thecentres.

· Review the effectiveness of processes for employee development through appraisals and trainingneeds.

· Plan and analyse reports and other required documents by theHQ.

postedCompany.description:
About IChild Company

Since 2008, IChild Company Ltd is a Professional EduTalents Consultant firm representing 500 over preschool / educational employers in Singapore, sourcing and advising them on their local / foreign talents needs. 

Focus on serving the educational industry, in particularly the Peschool and Pre-Primary sector. we are also an EduTech company, offering a wide range of emerging services to the educational clients so as to serve them holistically and most importantly, knowing their requirements well. The following are some of the services that we provides:

- Info-Tech Solution Services such as the Centre ERP Management System
- Overseas Business Consultancy
- Talent Acquisition Consultancy.
postedCompany.name: ICHILD COMPANY PTE. LTD.

hiringCompany.description:
Wisdom Star Preschool offers developmental and age-appropriate curriculums and programs. This is because we recognized that children are unique individuals developing at different paces. Each and every child has individual interests, temperaments and learning styles. In order to ensure every child’s latent potential is released through our program, underpinning our curriculum is the principles of learning through play approach.

By using this pedagogic approach, we make the best use of the inquisitive mind of children in a fun-filled method and learning without stress to promotes early literacy skills and knowledge as well as to enhance physical and psychosocial growth and development. The programs are integrated with different sets of subjects to achieve a holistic development in a systemic process; to encourage children to explore and discover at their individual pace in systematic stages.
hiringCompany.name: WISDOM STAR PRESCHOOL @ LE QUEST PTE. LTD.
